description: The university rocketry team's launch event is approaching and weather forecasts predict variable wind conditions. As the safety officer, conduct a parametric wind sensitivity study using the rocket design at /home/ga/Documents/rockets/wind_sensitivity.ork. Create at least 6 flight simulations with average wind speeds ranging from 0 m/s to at least 10 m/s, including 0 m/s and at least 5 distinct non-zero values. Export the comparison data (wind speed, apogee, and ground hit distance) to /home/ga/Documents/exports/wind_sensitivity.csv. Write a launch readiness report to /home/ga/Documents/exports/wind_report.txt summarizing the impact of wind speed on flight parameters and recommending a specific maximum wind speed threshold for a safe launch.
